privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Campus Sheba ("we", "us", or "our") operates the Campus Sheba mobile application and website. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body:
To provide campus services, we may collect the following information when you use Campus Sheba:

• Location data — to show nearby places, transport, and campus-relevant services
• Student ID — to verify your enrollment and connect you with campus-specific features
• Phone number — for account verification, notifications, and emergency contact features
• Email address — for account creation, waitlist updates, and service communications
• Usage data — such as app interactions, device type, and log data to improve performance and security

use.title: How we use your information
use.body:
We use the information we collect only to operate and improve Campus Sheba, including to:

• Create and manage your account
• Deliver campus maps, transport, marketplace, food, health, and community features
• Send important service updates and security notifications
• Provide customer support
• Analyze usage to improve the app experience and fix issues

We do not use your personal data for unrelated advertising purposes.

sharing.title: Data sharing and sale
sharing.body:
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. This is a core value of Campus Sheba.

We may share limited data only when necessary to:

• Service providers who help us run the app (e.g. hosting, analytics) under strict confidentiality agreements
• Comply with applicable law, regulation, or legal process
• Protect the safety and rights of users and the public

Any third-party processors are required to handle your data securely and only for the purposes we specify.

security.title: Data storage and security
security.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, but we work continuously to safeguard your data.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, and to withdraw consent where processing is based on consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at support@campussheba.com.

children.title: Children and students
children.body: Campus Sheba is designed for university and college students. If you are under the age required to consent in your jurisdiction, you should use the app only with parental or institutional guidance as applicable.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the revised policy on this page and update the "Last updated" date. Continued use of Campus Sheba after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at support@campussheba.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Campus Sheba mobile application and website (the "Service"). By using Campus Sheba, you agree to these Terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By creating an account, joining the waitlist, or otherwise using Campus Sheba, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

service.title: The service
service.body: Campus Sheba provides a digital platform for campus life, including features such as maps, transport, marketplace, food, health resources, and community tools. Features may change, be added, or be removed as we develop the product. Some services may be offered by third parties and are subject to their own terms.

account.title: Your account
account.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account. You agree to provide accurate information, including a valid student ID where required, and to update it when it changes.

conduct.title: Acceptable use
conduct.body:
You agree not to misuse Campus Sheba. Prohibited conduct includes, without limitation:

• Violating applicable laws or university policies
• Harassing, threatening, or impersonating others
• Posting false, misleading, or fraudulent listings or content
• Attempting to gain unauthorized access to systems or other users' accounts
• Using the Service for spam, scraping, or automated abuse

We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

content.title: User content
content.body: You retain ownership of content you submit. By posting content on Campus Sheba, you grant us a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute that content solely to operate and promote the Service. You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to share any content you post.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: Campus Sheba, including its name, logo, design, and software, is owned by us or our licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our materials without written permission.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Campus Sheba is provided "as is" and "as available." We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Transport schedules, marketplace listings, health information, and other third-party content are provided for convenience and may not always be accurate or complete.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Campus Sheba and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Your continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@campussheba.com.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion Process
accountDeletion.intro: You can request deletion of your Campus Sheba account directly from the mobile app. Follow the steps below to start the process.

steps.1: Open the Campus Sheba application and navigate to the Menu tab.
steps.2: Tap on the Delete Account button.
steps.3: A confirmation prompt will appear. Confirm your request to delete the account.
steps.4: Once confirmed, your account will be disabled immediately.
steps.5: The account will then be placed in a pending deletion state.
steps.6: Final account deletion will be completed by the Admin Team after review and processing.

note.title: Important note
note.body: After confirming the deletion request, you may lose access to your account and associated services while waiting for final deletion approval.

contact.title: Need help?
contact.body: For further questions about account deletion, contact us at
